Volunteer Staffed

Who We Are

Built on Service & Sacrifice

Our dedicated volunteers respond to fire emergencies, medical calls, motor vehicle accidents, hazmat incidents, and rescue operations — 24 hours a day, 365 days a year.


We are ordinary people who choose to do extraordinary things for our neighbors. With deep roots in the Marshall County community, we stand ready when our neighbors need us most.

24/7
Always On Call
Free
Emergency Response

What We Do

Emergency Response Services

🔥
Structural Firefighting

Rapid response to residential, commercial, and rural structure fires throughout the Texoma Fire District.

🌾
Wildland & Grass Fire

Suppression of grass, brush, and wildland fires — critical in Oklahoma's dry plains environment.

🚑
Medical First Response

Trained first responders provide life-saving medical support until EMS arrives on scene.

🚗
Vehicle Accidents

Extrication and scene safety support for motor vehicle accidents on area roadways.

⚗️
Hazmat Response

Coordinated response to incidents involving hazardous materials to protect people and the environment.

🔍
Search & Rescue

Swift water, land search, and rescue operations for lost or injured persons in the Texoma region.

In Action

Serving Our Community

Live Pump Training
Hose Deployment Drill
Community Outreach

Join the Department

Answer the Call

Our community depends on volunteers like you. Whether you want to serve your neighbors, gain valuable training, or be part of something larger than yourself — the Texoma VFD welcomes you.

  • Must be 18 years of age or older
  • Reside within the Texoma Fire District
  • Willing to complete required training courses
  • Pass a background check
  • Able to respond to calls during available hours
  • Current fire district dues membership

Pick up an application at the station, or contact Chief Todd Cissell directly.


Call to Apply: (580) 565-4491
Now
Accepting
Applications

Become a Member

Your annual membership directly funds our operations — equipment, training, gear, and everything it takes to keep your community safe. Zeffy processes all payments with zero fees, so 100% of every dollar goes straight to Texoma Fire District, Inc.
